en: one-minute English in this one-minute lesson we are going to have a look at
some different meanings for put on put on can mean to dress or wear something
we can use put on for clothes glasses jewelry and other accessories for
example when I leave the house I put on my shoes another meaning of put on can
be to add or gain weight for example I eat junk food every day so I put on
weight put on also means to start some kind of equipment or device for example
I like to put on some music when I exercise give it a go try making a
sentence using put on and leave it in the comments below
